source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A mixing chamber with heat transfer receives 2 kg/s of R-410a, at 1 MPa, 40\circ\text{C} in one line and 1 kg/s of R-410a at 15\circ\text{C} with a quality of 50% in a line with a valve. The outgoing flow is at 1 MPa, 60\circ\text{C}. Find the rate of heat transfer to the mixing chamber.
